verses.kjv: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, in the likeness of God made he him;
verses.ct: This is the written record of Adam's family line. When God created human beings, he made them to look like himself.
verses.web: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, he made him in God’s likeness.

verses.kjv: Male and female created he them; and blessed them, and called their name Adam, in the day when they were created.
verses.ct: He created them male and female, blessed them, and called them humans.
verses.web: He created them male and female, and blessed them. On the day they were created, he named them Adam.

verses.kjv: And Adam lived an hundred and thirty years, and begat a son in his own likeness, after his image; and called his name Seth:
verses.ct: When Adam was 130 years old, he had a son who looked just like him, and he named him Seth.
verses.web: Adam lived one hundred thirty years, and became the father of a son in his own likeness, after his image, and named him Seth.

verses.kjv: And the days of Adam after he had begotten Seth were eight hundred years: and he begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Seth was born, Adam lived another 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: The days of Adam after he became the father of Seth were eight hundred years, and he became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years: and he died.
verses.ct: Adam lived a total of 930 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All the days that Adam lived were nine hundred thirty years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Seth lived an hundred and five years, and begat Enos:
verses.ct: When Seth was 105 years old, he had a son named Enosh.
verses.web: Seth lived one hundred five years, then became the father of Enosh.

verses.kjv: And Seth lived after he begat Enos eight hundred and seven years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Enosh was born, Seth lived another 807 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Seth lived after he became the father of Enosh eight hundred seven years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years: and he died.
verses.ct: Seth lived a total of 912 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All of the days of Seth were nine hundred twelve years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Enos lived ninety years, and begat Cainan:
verses.ct: When Enosh was 90 years old, he had a son named Kenan.
verses.web: Enosh lived ninety years, and became the father of Kenan.

verses.kjv: And Enos lived after he begat Cainan eight hundred and fifteen years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Kenan was born, Enosh lived another 815 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Enosh lived after he became the father of Kenan eight hundred fifteen years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Enos were nine hundred and five years: and he died.
verses.ct: Enosh lived a total of 905 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All of the days of Enosh were nine hundred five years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Cainan lived seventy years, and begat Mahalaleel:
verses.ct: When Kenan was 70 years old, he had a son named Mahalalel.
verses.web: Kenan lived seventy years, then became the father of Mahalalel.

verses.kjv: And Cainan lived after he begat Mahalaleel eight hundred and forty years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Mahalalel was born, Kenan lived another 840 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Kenan lived after he became the father of Mahalalel eight hundred forty years, and became the father of other sons and daughters

verses.kjv: And all the days of Cainan were nine hundred and ten years: and he died.
verses.ct: Kenan lived a total of 910 years, and then he died.
verses.web: and all of the days of Kenan were nine hundred ten years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Mahalaleel lived sixty and five years, and begat Jared:
verses.ct: When Mahalalel was 65 years old, he had a son named Jared.
verses.web: Mahalalel lived sixty-five years, then became the father of Jared.

verses.kjv: And Mahalaleel lived after he begat Jared eight hundred and thirty years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Jared was born, Mahalalel lived another 830 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Mahalalel lived after he became the father of Jared eight hundred thirty years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Mahalaleel were eight hundred ninety and five years: and he died.
verses.ct: Mahalalel lived a total of 895 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All of the days of Mahalalel were eight hundred ninety-five years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Jared lived an hundred sixty and two years, and he begat Enoch:
verses.ct: When Jared was 162 years old, he had a son named Enoch.
verses.web: Jared lived one hundred sixty-two years, then became the father of Enoch.

verses.kjv: And Jared lived after he begat Enoch eight hundred years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Enoch was born, Jared lived another 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Jared lived after he became the father of Enoch eight hundred years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty and two years: and he died.
verses.ct: Jared lived a total of 962 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All of the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty-two years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Enoch lived sixty and five years, and begat Methuselah:
verses.ct: When Enoch was 65 years old, he had a son named Methuselah.
verses.web: Enoch lived sixty-five years, then became the father of Methuselah.

verses.kjv: And Enoch walked with God after he begat Methuselah three hundred years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Methuselah was born, Enoch walked closely with God for another 300 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: After Methuselah’s birth, Enoch walked with God for three hundred years, and became the father of more sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty and five years:
verses.ct: Enoch lived a total of 365 years.
verses.web: All the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty-five years.

verses.kjv: And Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him.
verses.ct: Enoch walked so closely with God that one day he simply vanished — God took him.
verses.web: Enoch walked with God, and he was not found, for God took him.

verses.kjv: And Methuselah lived an hundred eighty and seven years, and begat Lamech:
verses.ct: When Methuselah was 187 years old, he had a son named Lamech.
verses.web: Methuselah lived one hundred eighty-seven years, then became the father of Lamech.

verses.kjv: And Methuselah lived after he begat Lamech seven hundred eighty and two years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Lamech was born, Methuselah lived another 782 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Methuselah lived after he became the father of Lamech seven hundred eighty-two years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years: and he died.
verses.ct: Methuselah lived a total of 969 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty-nine years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Lamech lived an hundred eighty and two years, and begat a son:
verses.ct: When Lamech was 182 years old, he had a son.
verses.web: Lamech lived one hundred eighty-two years, then became the father of a son.

verses.kjv: And he called his name Noah, saying, This same shall comfort us concerning our work and toil of our hands, because of the ground which the LORD hath cursed.
verses.ct: He named him Noah and said, "This boy will bring us relief from the hard work and pain of farming the ground that the LORD cursed."
verses.web: He named him Noah, saying, “This one will comfort us in our work and in the toil of our hands, caused by the ground which LORD has cursed.”

verses.kjv: And Lamech lived after he begat Noah five hundred ninety and five years, and begat sons and daughters:
verses.ct: After Noah was born, Lamech lived another 595 years and had other sons and daughters.
verses.web: Lamech lived after he became the father of Noah five hundred ninety-five years, and became the father of other sons and daughters.

verses.kjv: And all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years: and he died.
verses.ct: Lamech lived a total of 777 years, and then he died.
verses.web: All the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy-seven years, then he died.

verses.kjv: And Noah was five hundred years old: and Noah begat Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
verses.ct: After Noah turned 500 years old, he became the father of Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
verses.web: Noah was five hundred years old, then Noah became the father of Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
